# `.github/workflows/docker-image.yml`

**YAML** · 56 lines · 1,444 bytes · 1 commit(s) · first 2026-06-01 · last 2026-06-01

## Purpose

Builds the web-console image and pushes it to GHCR so the desktop manager (and `docker run`) can pull ghcr.io/<owner>/<repo>:latest.
